title: strophanthus gracilis
intro: Strophanthus gracilis, also known as the East African Strophanthus, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It is a climber or shrub with medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain strophanthin and other cardioactive glycosides that have been used to treat various heart conditions. The health benefits of Strophanthus gracilis include its ability to reduce blood pressure, slow heart rate, and increase cardiac output, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as angina and congestive heart failure. Strophanthus gracilis is often used in herbal preparations, including tinctures, infusions, and extracts, although its use should be under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional due to its potential toxicity and interactions with other medications.
